name: Deal Stage Velocity Alert
description: Alerts when a deal stays in a stage 2x longer than the org average, indicating it may be stuck.
descriptionAr: ينبّه عندما تبقى صفقة في مرحلة ضعف المتوسط، مما يشير إلى احتمال توقفها.

config.title: Slow deal: {{title}}
config.body: Deal {{title}} has been in stage for longer than average. Review and take action.
